ddls:
CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the developer account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login to the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the developer account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics data being accessed */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES graphics_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graphics_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of graphics data */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or name of the graphics data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the graphics data */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of graphics data (e.g., image, 3D model, video frame) */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics format */,
  "bit_depth" INTEGER /* Bit depth of the graphics data */,
  "is_signed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data is signed or unsigned */,
  "texture_filtering" TEXT /* Type of texture filtering used */,
  "color_rendering_mode" TEXT /* Color rendering mode used */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who uploaded the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the graphics data in bytes */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graphics_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES graphics_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graphics_data_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graphics_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graphics format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the graphics format (e.g., RED, RG, RGB) */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the graphics format */,
  "max_bit_depth" INTEGER /* Maximum bit depth supported by the format */,
  "is_signed_supported" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the format supports signed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics data */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the developer has read access */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the developer has write access */,
  "delete_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the developer has delete access */,
  "share_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the developer can share the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES graphics_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics data */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer in the collaboration (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES graphics_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graphics data */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the data has been accessed */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the data has been edited */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the data */,
  "last_edited" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last edit to the data */,
  "average_access_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of access events in seconds */,
  "total_storage_used" INTEGER /* Total storage used by the data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES graphics_data ("data_id")
)
